docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $660.75 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON ROSA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON ROSA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDERSON ROSA $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $330.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
